Class EfsEventBus.Subscription<E extends IEfsEvent>

java.lang.Object
org.efs.bus.EfsEventBus.Subscription<E>
Type Parameters:
E - efs event class.
All Implemented Interfaces:
AutoCloseable
Enclosing class:
EfsEventBus
public abstract static class EfsEventBus.Subscription<E extends IEfsEvent> extends Object
Abstract base class for concrete, inbox, and router subscriptions. Defines AutoCloseable.close method.
Author:
Charles W. Rapp

  • Field Details

    • mTopic

      protected final org.efs.bus.EfsEventBus.TopicFeed<E extends IEfsEvent> mTopic
      Accesses this topic feed.

    • mAgent

      protected final IEfsAgent mAgent
      Publishing or subscribing agent. Set to null for a RouterSubscription.

    • mActive

      protected final AtomicBoolean mActive
      Set to true if access point is active and false otherwise. Initially set to true.

    • mPubStatus

      protected final AtomicBoolean mPubStatus
      Set to true if there is a publisher actively posting events to this topic and false if not. Initially set to false.

    • mEventCount

      protected long mEventCount
      Total number of events posted/received on this advertisement/subscription.

    • mLatestEvent

      protected Instant mLatestEvent
      Timestamp of latest event posted/received on this topic. Initialized to epoch time.

  • Constructor Details

    • Subscription

      protected Subscription(org.efs.bus.EfsEventBus.TopicFeed<E> topic, IEfsAgent subscriber)
      Creates subscription for given topic feed and subscribing agent.
      Parameters:
      topic - subscription is for this topic.
      subscriber - agent placing this subscription.

  • Method Details

    • forwardPublishStatus

      protected abstract void forwardPublishStatus(EfsPublishStatus<E> pse)
      Dispatches fowardEvent status event to subscriber.
      Parameters:
      pse - fowardEvent status event.

    • fowardEvent

      protected abstract void fowardEvent(E event)
      Performs work of dispatching given event to subscribing agent and callback.
      Parameters:
      event - dispatch this event to subscribing agent and callback.

    • close

      public final void close() throws Exception
      Closes this subscription. Once completed, events will no longer be dispatched to subscriber. It is possible that events dispatched to subscriber prior to closing this subscription will be delivered after this method returned.

      If subscription is already closed, then does nothing.

      Throws:
      Exception - if an error occurs closing this subscription.

    • topicKey

      public final EfsTopicKey<E> topicKey()
      Returns event class+topic key for this feed.
      Returns:
      event class+topic key.

    • isOpen

      public final boolean isOpen()
      Returns true if this access point is open and false if closed. Note: once an access point is closed, it remains closed and cannot be re-opened.
      Returns:
      true if open and false if closed.

    • isPublished

      public final boolean isPublished()
      Returned value interpretation depends on whether this is an advertisement or a subscription:
      • Advertisement: true means that publisher is able to post events to topic and false if unable to post.
      • Subscription: true means there is at least one publisher actively posting events to this topic and false means there are no publishers.
      Note: a true value does not mean that events are actively being posted to the topic but only that they may be posted. Conversely, false means that no events are being posted to the topic.
      Returns:
      true if events may be posted to topic and false if events are not being posted to topic.

    • eventCount

      public final long eventCount()
      Returns total number of events posted/received by this advertisement/subscription since opening.
      Returns:
      total number of events on this access point.

    • latestEvent

      @Nonnull public final Instant latestEvent()
      Returns timestamp of latest event posted/received by this advertisement/subscription. If no event has crossed this access point, then returns epoch time.
      Returns:
      latest event timestamp.
